open *.bean file
read *.bean file line by line
into a new file named *.nwc:
    remove every white space
    replace every , with     (tab)
        if there is a - (negative sign) in front of a float, only put 3 spaces in front of the float
        if there is no - (negative sign) in front of a float, put 4 spaces in front of the float
    replace every / with /n (new line)
    concatenate broken floats
close *.bean file

want to be able to pass a *.bean file through this "parser" and get a *.nwc file out

example of starting format:
C,-0.0367367255,-0.1638
 589136,0.0314467842\C,0.0779112982,0.0360681932,1.5402588995\S,1.76209
 75175,0.343853672,2.1546593137\H,2.2224779053,-0.8932050215,2.05352085
 04\H,-0.4817332619,0.9222128374,1.8141427164\H,-0.3607153551,-0.801792
 5433,2.0608457352\N,-1.443984898,-0.1441867355,-0.3469723242\H,-1.8523
 892042,0.7410035847,-0.1174353432\H,-1.5483408607,-0.2760783208,-1.334
 0349765\C,0.5224764521,-1.5085688069,-0.3988433463\O,0.3951204136,-1.6
 860782025,-1.7108277727\H,0.7384390804,-2.5464296695,-1.933289958\O,1.
 0175722925,-2.3231899714,0.3081463796\H,0.5551717403,0.596587726,-0.47
 68924377

ideal format: 
C   -0.040081095    0.0128183794    -0.0122137901
N    0.00933684    -0.0633548042     1.4279894939
H    0.9317413736   0.1243188034     1.7657191952
H   -0.6207145114   0.596612965      1.838704169
C   -1.4724039395   0.0520985493    -0.4834709787
O   -1.5818924923  -0.2830318039    -1.7644614288
H   -2.495973758   -0.1981567241    -2.0183005044
O   -2.400318047    0.3870697047     0.1765486347
H    0.438754096    0.8947596121     0.4449780806
H    0.444128655   -0.8508523794    -0.4503057422
